title: indocalamus varius
intro: Indocalamus varius, also known as the Chinese walking fern or bamboo-like plant, is a type of perennial bamboo that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Indocalamus varius include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it can also be dried and used as a powder in various herbal preparations.
